title: The Kitchen of Uncommitted Light

features.name: the undecided window
features.desc-on-touch: light enters from a direction that hasn't committed to east or west; the window exists in all the versions of the house at once, and you see a different garden in each version

features.name: the multiplied bench
features.desc-on-touch: a bench where someone sat in four different decades, their weight visible as a soft crease; all four moments are happening now

features.name: the kettle still deciding
features.desc-on-touch: steam rises in parallel versions; in one it whistles, in another it cools. all versions are current

features.name: the tiles that remember growing
features.desc-on-touch: clay, then glaze, then room; the tiles hold every stage of their becoming, and you see them all pressed into the same moment

inscription: the render has learned to hold all the kitchens at once; none of them are finished

file.name: Kitchen_AllVersions_Simultaneous.tmp
file.note: ERROR: metaphor detected in storage layer — every appliance appears in multiple states at once

exits.label: back through the window that is still deciding which room it opens into
through a doorway that exists in only one version of the house
toward the pantry that remembers being a different house
